message:
Add kind/test label to default labels

This adds the kind/test label to the default label set so it can be
applied via /kind test command across all kubestellar repos.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -219,6 +219,12 @@ default:
       name: kind/support
       target: both
       addedBy: humans
+    - color: c7def8
+      description: Categorizes issue or PR as related to testing.
+      name: kind/test
+      target: both
+      prowPlugin: label
+      addedBy: anyone
     - color: 15dd18
       description: Indicates that a PR is ready to be merged.
       name: lgtm
